Most of the orders will be shipped out within 2 business days after payment is cleared except weekend or holiday.


Note: Only sales in the USA (Excluding Alaska, Hawaii, AP, AE, Puerto Rico, Guam, Palau, U.S.Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Micronesia, United States Minor Outlying Islands, The United States Miscellaneous Pacific Islands, The Republic of Marshall Islands,Northern Mariana).

If the product you received is wrong or damaged, please provide the clear photos with any visible part numbers and contact us directly within 30 days. We’ll try our best to help you resolve the problem.


ABOUT US:


Your satisfaction is our top priority. We will try our best to do everything well. If you're pleased with the transaction and are satisfied with our service, we hope you could respond with positive feedback.
